get.summary: Run API health checks and return pass/fail status with details on any failures.
Retrieve headway data for the given date and stop(s).
get.description:
Args:
  user_date: Date string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
  Query params - stop: One or more stop IDs.

Returns:
  Response: JSON response containing headway event data.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: user_date
parameters.description: Date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

get.summary: Retrieve dwell time data for the given date and stop(s).
get.description:
Args:
  user_date: Date string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
  Query params - stop: One or more stop IDs.

Returns:
  Response: JSON response containing dwell time event data.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: user_date
parameters.description: Date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

get.summary: Retrieve travel time data between stop pairs for the given date.
get.description:
Args:
  user_date: Date string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
  Query params - from_stop: One or more origin stop IDs.
  Query params - to_stop: One or more destination stop IDs.

Returns:
  Response: JSON response containing travel time event data.

parameters.name: from_stop
parameters.description: Origin MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: to_stop
parameters.description: Destination MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: user_date
parameters.description: Date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

get.summary: Retrieve transit alerts for the given date and route(s).
get.description:
Args:
  user_date: Date string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
  Query params - route: One or more route IDs.

Returns:
  Response: JSON response containing alert data.

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: MBTA route ID. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Bus: numeric string (e.g. `1`, `66`). Commuter rail: `CR-{line}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount`). Ferry: `Boat-F1`, `Boat-F4`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid route IDs.

parameters.name: user_date
parameters.description: Date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

get.summary: Retrieve aggregated travel time data over a date range, grouped by date.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: from_stop
parameters.description: Origin MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: to_stop
parameters.description: Destination MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.description: Origin MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

parameters.name: to_stop

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.

get.summary: Return the current git commit ID. Only available on localhost.
Fetch current live alerts from the MBTA v3 API.
Retrieve alert-based delay data aggregated by line over a date range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: Line identifier. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Commuter rail: `CR-Fairmount`, `CR-Lowell`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid values.

parameters.name: agg
parameters.description: Aggregation period: `daily` or `weekly`.

get.summary: Retrieve trip metrics (speed, travel time, etc.) aggregated by line over a date range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: agg
parameters.description: Aggregation period: `daily`, `weekly`, or `monthly`.

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: Line identifier. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Commuter rail: `CR-Fairmount`, `CR-Lowell`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid values.

get.summary: Retrieve scheduled service counts for a route over a date range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: route_id
parameters.description: MBTA route ID. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Bus: numeric string (e.g. `1`, `66`). Commuter rail: `CR-{line}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount`). Ferry: `Boat-F1`, `Boat-F4`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid route IDs. Omit to return all routes.

parameters.name: agg
parameters.description: Aggregation period: `daily`, `weekly`, or `monthly`.

get.summary: Retrieve ridership data for a line over a date range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: line_id
parameters.description: Line identifier for ridership data. Rapid transit: `line-Red`, `line-Orange`, `line-Blue`, `line-Green`. Bus: `line-{route}` (e.g. `line-1`, `line-66`). Commuter rail: `line-{line}` (e.g. `line-Fairmount`). Ferry: `line-F1`, `line-F4`, etc. Omit to return all lines.

get.summary: Fetch facility data (elevators, escalators) from the MBTA v3 API.
Retrieve speed restriction data for a line on a given date.

parameters.name: line_id
parameters.description: Rapid transit line identifier: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, or `Green`. Speed restriction data is only available for rapid transit lines.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to query (YYYY-MM-DD).

get.summary: Retrieve delivered service hours for a line over a date range.

parameters.name: line_id
parameters.description: Line identifier. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Commuter rail: `CR-Fairmount`, `CR-Lowell`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid values. Omit to aggregate all lines.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: agg
parameters.description: Aggregation period: `daily`, `weekly`, or `monthly`.

get.summary: Retrieve time prediction accuracy data for a route.

parameters.name: route_id
parameters.description: MBTA route ID. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Bus: numeric string (e.g. `1`, `66`). Commuter rail: `CR-{line}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount`). Ferry: `Boat-F1`, `Boat-F4`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid route IDs.

get.summary: Retrieve combined service and ridership data for the overview dashboard.
Get a manifest of all available routes supported in the dashboard.
get.description:
Returns:
    Response: JSON response containing route IDs grouped by category
        (rapid_transit, bus, commuter_rail, ferry), cached for one day.

get.summary: Get the stop information for a specific route.
get.description:
Args:
    route_id: The route ID to look up stops for.

Returns:
    Response: JSON response containing station/stop data including names, IDs,
        and directions, or a 404 response if the route is not found.

parameters.name: route_id
parameters.description: MBTA route ID. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`–`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Bus: numeric string (e.g. `1`, `66`). Commuter rail: `CR-{line}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount`). Ferry: `Boat-F1`, `Boat-F4`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid route IDs.

HealthcheckResponse.description:
Response for `/api/healthcheck`.

Attributes:
    status: `"pass"` or `"fail"`.
    failed_checks_sum: Number of failed checks, if any.
    failed_checks: Map of check name to failure detail.
HealthcheckResponse.title: HealthcheckResponse

HeadwayParams.description:
Query parameters for `/api/headways/{user_date}`.

Attributes:
    stop: One or more stop IDs to retrieve headway data for.

stop.description: MBTA stop ID. Rapid transit: 5-digit numeric (e.g. `70061`). Bus: `{route}-{direction}-{n}` (e.g. `1-0-110`). Commuter rail: `{route}_{direction}_{stop_code}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount_0_DB-2205-01`). Use `/api/stops/{route_id}` to look up valid stop IDs for a route.
stop.title: Stop

HeadwayResponse.description:
Response for `/api/headways/{date}` — raw headway events for a single day.

Attributes:
    headways: Headway data keyed by stop ID.
HeadwayResponse.title: HeadwayResponse

DwellParams.description:

start_date.description: Start of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).

Response for `/api/scheduledservice` — scheduled service counts and hours.

    end_date_service_levels: Service levels at the end of the date range.
    counts: Scheduled trip counts keyed by date string.

RidershipParams.description:
Parameters for the `/api/ridership` endpoint.

    start_date: Start of date range.
    end_date: End of date range.

start_date.title: Start Date

end_date.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).
end_date.title: End Date

line_id.description: Line identifier for ridership data. Rapid transit: `line-Red`, `line-Orange`, `line-Blue`, `line-Green`. Bus: `line-{route}` (e.g. `line-1`, `line-66`). Commuter rail: `line-{line}` (e.g. `line-Fairmount`). Ferry: `line-F1`, `line-F4`, etc. Omit to return all lines.

start_date.title: Start Date

end_date.description: End of the date range, inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).
end_date.title: End Date

ServiceHoursParams.title: ServiceHoursParams

ServiceHoursResponse.description:
Response for `/api/service_hours` — scheduled vs. delivered service hours.

Attributes:
    data: Service hours comparison data.
ServiceHoursResponse.title: ServiceHoursResponse

TimePredictionParams.description:
Parameters for the `/api/time_predictions` endpoint.

Attributes:
    route_id: Route identifier (e.g., `Red`, `CR-Fairmount`).

route_id.description: MBTA route ID. Rapid transit: `Red`, `Orange`, `Blue`, `Green-B`-`Green-E`, `Mattapan`. Bus: numeric string (e.g. `1`, `66`). Commuter rail: `CR-{line}` (e.g. `CR-Fairmount`). Ferry: `Boat-F1`, `Boat-F4`, etc. Use `/api/routes` to list all valid route IDs.
route_id.title: Route Id

TimePredictionParams.title: TimePredictionParams

TimePredictionResponse.description:
Response for `/api/time_predictions` — time prediction model data.

Attributes:
    predictions: Prediction model data for a route.
TimePredictionResponse.title: TimePredictionResponse

ServiceRidershipDashboardResponse.description:
Response for `/api/service_ridership_dashboard` — system-wide summary.

Attributes:
    summaryData: System-wide summary metrics.
    lineData: Per-line metrics.
ServiceRidershipDashboardResponse.title: ServiceRidershipDashboardResponse

RoutesResponse.description:
Response for `/api/routes` — lists all available routes by transit mode.

Attributes:
    rapid_transit: Rapid transit route IDs (e.g., `Red`, `Orange`, `Green-B`).
    bus: Bus route IDs.
    commuter_rail: Commuter rail route IDs (e.g., `CR-Fairmount`).
    ferry: Ferry route IDs (e.g., `Boat-F1`).
RoutesResponse.title: RoutesResponse

StopsResponse.description:
Response for `/api/stops/{route_id}` — station/stop info for a route.

Attributes:
    type: Route type (e.g., `rapid_transit`, `bus`, `commuter_rail`).
    direction: Map of direction ID to direction name (e.g., `{"0": "Southbound"}`).
    stations: Ordered list of stations/stops along the route.
    service_start: Service start date, if applicable.
    service_end: Service end date, if applicable.
StopsResponse.title: StopsResponse

ByDayKindServiceLevels.description:
Service levels for a specific day type (weekday, Saturday, or Sunday).

Attributes:
    date: Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD).
    service_levels: Service count by hour (24 entries, index 0 = midnight).
ByDayKindServiceLevels.title: ByDayKindServiceLevels

ServiceLevelsByDayKind.description:
Service levels grouped by day type.

Attributes:
    weekday: Weekday service breakdown.
    saturday: Saturday service breakdown.
    sunday: Sunday service breakdown.
ServiceLevelsByDayKind.title: ServiceLevelsByDayKind

RidershipEntry.description:
A single day's ridership count.

Attributes:
    date: Date string (YYYY-MM-DD).
    count: Ridership count for the day.
RidershipEntry.title: RidershipEntry

StationStop.description:
A station or stop along a route.

Attributes:
    stop_name: Display name of the station.
    branches: Branch identifiers (used for Green Line), or `None`.
    station: Station identifier (e.g., `place-alfcl`).
    order: Position in route order (0-indexed).
    stops: Map of direction ID to list of stop IDs.
    accessible: Whether the station is ADA accessible.
    pedal_park: Whether the station has bike parking.
    enclosed_bike_parking: Whether the station has enclosed bike storage.
    terminus: Whether this is a terminal station.
    disabled: Whether this stop is currently disabled.
    short: Short display name.
StationStop.title: StationStop
